---
title : "Measuring Perceptions and Preferences for Meritocracy"
date : "2021-12-01"
author : "Castillo, Juan; Sanhueza, Julio Cesar Iturra; Rivas, Francisco Javier Meneses; Maldonado, Luis & Atria, Jorge"
categories : ["Journal Article"]
publication : "Socarxiv OSF preprint"
publication_short : "Socarxiv OSF preprint"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
---
---
[OSF Preregistration](https://osf.io/z45y2)[Github Repo](https://github.com/justicia-distributiva/merit-scale)


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Castillo, Juan; Sanhueza, Julio Cesar Iturra; Rivas, Francisco Javier Meneses; Maldonado, Luis & Atria, Jorge (2021). *Measuring Perceptions and Preferences for Meritocracy*. Socarxiv OSF preprint

:::
